/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/PD/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT #2, PC 664,487(A), A FELONY, IS GRANTED,/X:THE DEFENSE MAKES AN ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 2 TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PC 17(B)/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/CTORD:THE PEOPLE ARE TO FILE A CONFORMED AMENDED COMPLAINT/X:THE DEFENSE PUTS OVER ARRAIGNMENT UNTIL THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED,/OR/CONTD:FILING OF AMENDED COMPLAINT AND ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/
